mapper.select: select id as id, dept_code as deptCode, dept_name as deptName, status as status, sort_no as sortNo, remark as remark, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime from dept order by id desc

select id as id, service_code as serviceCode, service_name as serviceName, category as category, dept_id as deptId, price as price, duration_minutes as durationMinutes, description as description, status as status, sort_no as sortNo, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from service_item where is_deleted = 0 order by id desc

select id as id, medicine_code as medicineCode, medicine_name as medicineName, category as category, specification as specification, unit as unit, price as price, stock_qty as stockQty, warning_stock_qty as warningStockQty, producer as producer, allergy_risk as allergyRisk, usage_desc as usageDesc, status as status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from medicine_item where is_deleted = 0 order by id desc

select id as id, dict_type as dictType, dict_code as dictCode, dict_name as dictName, sort_no as sortNo ,remark as remark, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from sys_dict order by id desc

select id as id, config_key as configKey, config_value as configValue, config_name as configName, config_group as configGroup, remark as remark, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from sys_config order by id desc
